Notice Of Motion To Expunge Mechanic'S Lien And Request For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Dec-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna M. Hertzman, Esq., McInerney & Dillon, 510-465-7100, for defendants and moving party: Van Ness Towers, LLC and Van Ness and Turk Properties, LLC

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS VAN NESS TOWERS, LLC. and VAN NESS AND TURK PROPERTIES, LLC.'S Motion To Expunge Mechanic's Lien And Request For Attorneys' Fees.
Motion to expunge the mechanics lien is granted. Plaintiff's recordation of the lien was untimely under CC 3115. Request for attorney fees is denied without prejudice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
